channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump border czar Tom Homan wants Pope Leo XIV to ride along with ICE agents: 'They don't understand'
item.description: Tom Homan invites Pope Leo XIV to join ICE officers on a ride-along amid the ongoing feud between the Vatican and the Trump administration on immigrat...

item.title: Sec. Rollins Mulls Reviving Biden Fertilizer Program
item.description: Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins is considering reviving a Biden-era domestic fertilizer program as the Trump administration looks for ways to boo...

item.title: Sigh. Four GOP Senators Doom Sen. John Kennedy's SAVE America Act Fix
Dhillon to Newsmax: Va. Gun Laws Could Face DOJ Fight
item.description: A senior Justice Department official told Newsmax on Thursday that Virginia's sweeping new gun restrictions could violate the Second Amendment, escala...

item.title: Wowsers: House Ethics Committee Targeted North Carolina Democrat in Investigation No One Saw Coming
Mexican Mafia Takes a Hit As FBI Busts 43 in Major California Takedown
Uber-Enthusiastic Lefty Network Data Whiz Examines Trump Effect on the Market: 'It's Up Like a Rocket!'
Republicans fail to attach SAVE America Act to party-line funding package
item.description: Senate Republicans Tom Tillis, Lisa Murkowski, Susan Collins and Mitch McConnell voted against a voter ID amendment to the GOP immigration enforcement...

item.title: DOJ Targets 384 for Denaturalization in Expanded Crackdown
item.description: The Justice Department has identified 384 foreign-born Americans whose citizenship it intends to revoke, marking a significant expansion of denaturali...

item.title: NTSB Calls for Alcohol Detection on School Buses
item.description: After a school bus rolled on a West Virginia highway two years ago, forcing one boy to have his leg amputated and seriously injuring two other childre...

item.title: DOJ charges 2 Chinese nationals who allegedly ran overseas cryptocurrency scam center targeting Americans
item.description: Jeanine Pirro vows the Trump administration is "just getting started" after Justice Department charges two Chinese nationals in overseas scam operatio...

item.title: James Comer's new bills could curb federal fraud in Minnesota and California
item.description: House Republicans introduced legislation to stop federal fraud in states like Minnesota and California, where billions in taxpayer dollars were stolen...

item.title: Defeated Virginia Republicans regroup for last-chance fight to save House majority
item.description: Virginia's redistricting fight heads to the state Supreme Court after a judge declared ballot language unconstitutional and blocked certification.

item.title: Trump Praises Phelan After Sudden Exit as Navy Chief
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday praised John Phelan, who stepped down Wednesday as Navy secretary, saying he did "an outstanding job" helping rebui...

item.title: DOJ Indictment Puts SPLCâs Massive War Chest Under the Microscope
